history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man in a blue t-shirt and black shorts is sitting on a dirt path at the summit of a mountain. He is holding a wooden sign that reads "BISMO 2365 MDPL Selarangboyo" in red and yellow lettering. Behind him are several directional signs. The top sign says "PUNCAK" (Summit) in white text on a black background. Below that, a sign reads "INDRAPRASTA" in white text on a dark blue background. The next sign, in white text on a dark background, says "MT. BISMA 2365" with "HDPL" to the right. Below this, two signs are side-by-side: one reads "DI LARAI" and the other reads "DI AREA". To the right of these, two more signs read "AMP" and "CAK". The background is a hazy, overcast sky with some green foliage and trees visible on either side of the path. The lighting is soft and diffused due to the cloudy sky. The color palette is dominated by earthy tones of brown and green, with the bright red and yellow of the man's sign providing a focal point. The mood is triumphant and adventurous, suggesting a successful climb to the summit. The image has a slightly low-angle perspective, emphasizing the height of the mountain. The man is smiling and looking towards the camera. He is wearing grey athletic shoes with white soles and a prominent grey 'N' logo.
